_comment_figure_size: figure_size: [width, height], matplotlib figure size in inches.
_comment_layout: layout_width_ratios: [battlefield, plot-column-2 (slots 01-06), column-3 (slots 07-10 + bottom DEBUG)]. layout_height_ratios: [top-two-rows, middle-two-rows, bottom-two-rows] shared by both plot columns. Suggested baseline for 1920x1080 is [100, 45, 45] and [1.0, 1.0, 0.2]. Plot slot positions are fixed; only which metric is shown in each slot should change later.
_comment_battlefield_style: battlefield_bg_color: panel background hex; grid_line_style: grid linestyle; grid_line_width: grid line width; grid_alpha: grid opacity.
_comment_ticks: tick_step_thresholds: choose axis tick step by current span (gt_140/gt_80/gt_40/else).
_comment_quiver: quiver_geometry: head_base=head width, head_height=head length, shaft_length=tail length, shaft_width=tail width.
_comment_death_linger: death_linger: ticks=linger duration, ring_radius=red circle radius, ring_color=red circle color.
_comment_post_elimination_extra_ticks: post_elimination_extra_ticks: after a winner is decided in auto-run mode (max_time_steps<=0), keep capturing/animating this many extra ticks before stopping.
_comment_auto_zoom: auto_zoom: tick_interval=check cadence; start_delay_ticks=keep initial full 1x view before auto-zoom activates; center_deadband=center snap tolerance; min_factor=max zoom factor (4x); offscreen_trigger_ratio=pan trigger ratio; centroid_trigger_ratio=pan trigger by total centroid offset ratio; follow_out_of_bounds=allow camera center outside [0,arena] when units move out; transition_ms=transition duration; zoomin_trigger_ratio=zoom trigger threshold.
_comment_background_haze: background_haze: center_ratio=[cx,cy]; angle_deg=rotation; inner_size_ratio=inner layer major-axis scale; outer_inner_ratio=outer/inner size multiplier; axis_ratio=minor/major; outer/inner_color=color; outer/inner_alpha=opacity.
_comment_background_major_star: background_major_star: radius_range=[min,max]; colors=candidate palette; glow_scale=halo radius multiplier; glow_alpha=halo opacity; core_alpha=core opacity; secondary_count_range controls random 0~2 secondary stars (binary/trinary visuals); secondary_scale can be a fixed number or [min,max] random range relative to primary; secondary_min_separation_ratio keeps secondary stars at far distance and avoids visual overlap with other major celestial effects.
_comment_background_orbits: background_orbits: shared orbit controls for the discrete orbit-pool planet/belt system. orbit_radius_base_ratio=global orbit radius base (applies to both planets and belts); orbit_count_range=sampled shared orbit slot count before auto-raising to fit requested objects; draw_orbits_enabled=draw visible orbit lines around the primary star for generated/shared orbit slots; orbit_line_color/alpha/width=orbit line style; draw_extent_ratio_max=allowed draw domain expansion relative to arena (1.25 => [-0.25*arena,1.25*arena]); eccentricity_near/eccentricity_far control how circular near orbits are and how elliptical far orbits become; planet_orbit_gap_ratio_min and belt_planet_exclusion_gap_ratio now act as soft shell-spacing hints during orbit-pool shaping; belt_belt_exclusion_scale remains a secondary soft-spacing modifier.
_comment_background_asteroids: background_asteroids: count_range=[min,max] planet-like bodies; orbit_ratio_range controls which shared orbit slots are eligible for planets; orbit_jitter_range now controls how much the discrete orbit slots are randomly expanded/compressed around an even spread; angle_jitter_deg controls per-orbit angular placement jitter; min_separation_ratio is retained as a soft local clearance term for visual placement; small/mid zone ratios shape size-vs-distance relation; moons add random satellites for medium/large bodies; gas_giant_ring controls ring rendering.
_comment_background_belts: background_belts: cluster_count_range=number of belt objects (recommended 2~3); points_per_360_degree_range=[min,max] point density baseline for a full 360-degree arc (sampled per belt object); actual points per belt object are computed as sampled_points_per_360 * actual_arc_span_deg / 360; orbit_ratio_range controls which shared orbit slots are eligible for belts; thickness_ratio_range controls belt object thickness; arc_span_deg_range controls belt object arc size (larger => visually larger object); curve_strength_range controls small random inward/outward bow toward star; asteroid_radius_range=size; color/alpha=style. Cross-slot spacing hints live in background_orbits.
